description: Slevomat is a Czech deals and voucher marketplace for experiences, travel, services, and goods. Customers buy vouchers for partner offers and redeem them according to the voucher instructions.
summary: Slevomat exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.slevomat.cz/mcp`; no public developer-facing REST, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found on `slevomat.cz`.
